claims.summary: Voice should remain available through Orange pressure and mute only at the Red safety threshold.
claims.disposition: verify the current autonomous source preserves speech below the Red threshold and records fill delta separately

claims.summary: Hebbian decay may make high-impact moments feel less persistent than their original intensity.
claims.disposition: route a bounded current-versus-halved-decay replay over existing scores and long-gap fixtures without changing live learning

claims.summary: Decay should slow in proportion to the fill shift caused by a consequential interaction.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 live Hebbian-learning wait requiring operator approval, replay, canary, abort criteria, and felt review
